Access-Control-Allow-Methods: POST, GET, OPTIONS, DELETE, HEAD, PATCH, PUT
Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Authorization, Content-Type, Accept, X-Requested-With, remember-me, x-timezone, client-key, x-request-client-key
Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests; block-all-mixed-content
